subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast acknowledged the Kingdom of God! I received thy letter wherein thou hast confessed the appearance of the Kingdom of God
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
